name: devmeet
description: DevMeet — Slack/Discord-style collaboration platform. Modular monolith.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && yarn dev" "cd frontend && yarn dev"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && yarn install && cd ../frontend && yarn install
scripts.build: cd backend && yarn build && cd ../frontend && yarn build
scripts.lint: cd backend && yarn lint && cd ../frontend && yarn lint
